## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, or sensitive personal data.
- [ ] No private organization names, private repo names, or real private tickets.
- [ ] Examples use placeholders, not real values.
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly (check headings, tables, code blocks).
- [ ] If adding a preference or template: it is generic enough for any user's setup.
